label: short
chain_of_thought:
Okay

I need to compute the sum of these three floor functions:

⌊1000/7⌋ + ⌊1000/11⌋ + ⌊1000/13⌋

Let me compute each one separately:

⌊1000/7⌋ = ⌊142.857...⌋ = 142

⌊1000/11⌋ = ⌊90.909...⌋ = 90

⌊1000/13⌋ = ⌊76.923...⌋ = 76

Now summing these values:

142 + 90 + 76 = 308

So the answer is 308.
